description: Lower reduced_risk_pct from 0.75% to 0.40% to keep Phase 2 trades firmly in the SHAP sweet spot. risk_pct is the 3rd most important feature (0.2888), and EVERY rule partition with risk_pct<0.50 outperforms baseline while EVERY partition with risk_pct>=0.50 underperforms. The Phase 2 switch from 0.5% to 0.75% risk INCREASES risk after building a cushion â€” but the SHAP data says the strategy edge degrades at higher risk levels, likely because larger position sizes hit worse fills on gold's wide spreads during volatile sessions and trigger wider stops more frequently.
expected_improvement: Phase 2 trades should recover from ~21-24% WR back toward ~35%+ by staying in the low-risk regime. Smaller lot sizes mean less slippage on gold. Prop firm pass rate improves via lower drawdown variance â€” Monte Carlo median max-DD should drop 25-30%, buying more runway for the strategy to compound.
